Cloud Engineer.title: Static Website Hosting on Cloud Storage
Cloud Engineer.expectedOutput: A live static website served from a cloud storage bucket with public read access configured via IAM policy.
Cloud Engineer.resumeBullet: Deployed a static website on AWS S3 with IAM-based access control, reducing hosting cost to near-zero.

Cloud Engineer.title: Infrastructure as Code for a 3-Tier App
Cloud Engineer.expectedOutput: A Terraform module that provisions a VPC, subnets, load balancer, and compute instances in one command.
Cloud Engineer.resumeBullet: Automated provisioning of a 3-tier cloud architecture using Terraform, cutting environment setup time from hours to minutes.

Cloud Engineer.title: Kubernetes Cluster with CI/CD Pipeline
Cloud Engineer.expectedOutput: A containerized app auto-deployed to a Kubernetes cluster via a CI/CD pipeline on every push.
Cloud Engineer.resumeBullet: Built a CI/CD pipeline deploying containerized workloads to Kubernetes, enabling zero-downtime releases.

Frontend Developer.title: Responsive Portfolio Landing Page
Frontend Developer.expectedOutput: A mobile-first landing page that adapts across breakpoints without a framework.
Frontend Developer.resumeBullet: Built a fully responsive landing page using CSS Grid and Flexbox, achieving 100% mobile usability score.

Frontend Developer.title: Weather Dashboard with API Integration
Frontend Developer.expectedOutput: A React app that fetches and displays live weather data with loading and error states.
Frontend Developer.resumeBullet: Developed a React weather dashboard consuming a REST API, with robust state and error handling.

Frontend Developer.title: Accessible Component Library
Frontend Developer.expectedOutput: A reusable, typed component library with keyboard navigation and screen-reader support.
Frontend Developer.resumeBullet: Designed a WCAG-compliant TypeScript component library adopted across multiple product teams.

Backend Developer.title: CRUD REST API for a Notes App
Backend Developer.expectedOutput: A working REST API with endpoints to create, read, update, and delete notes backed by a SQL database.
Backend Developer.resumeBullet: Built a RESTful CRUD API with SQL persistence, handling 100% of core note management operations.

Backend Developer.title: JWT-Authenticated Task Manager API
Backend Developer.expectedOutput: An API with signup/login, JWT-protected routes, and ORM-managed data models.
Backend Developer.resumeBullet: Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization for a multi-user task management API.

Backend Developer.title: Order Processing System with Queues
Backend Developer.expectedOutput: A backend that offloads order processing to a message queue with Redis caching for fast reads.
Backend Developer.resumeBullet: Architected an asynchronous order-processing system using message queues and Redis caching, improving throughput significantly.

Full Stack Developer.title: Personal Blog with Auth
Full Stack Developer.expectedOutput: A blog site where users can register, log in, and manage their own posts.
Full Stack Developer.resumeBullet: Built a full-stack blogging platform with user authentication and CRUD post management.

Full Stack Developer.title: E-Commerce Storefront
Full Stack Developer.expectedOutput: A storefront with product listings, cart, and checkout flow connected to a backend API.
Full Stack Developer.resumeBullet: Developed a full-stack e-commerce app with cart and checkout, integrating frontend and backend via REST APIs.

Full Stack Developer.title: Real-Time Collaboration Tool
Full Stack Developer.expectedOutput: A deployed app supporting real-time multi-user document editing.
Full Stack Developer.resumeBullet: Designed and deployed a real-time collaborative editing tool, optimizing performance under concurrent users.

AI Engineer.title: Data Preprocessing Pipeline
AI Engineer.expectedOutput: A cleaned, feature-ready dataset produced from raw, messy CSV data.
AI Engineer.resumeBullet: Built a data preprocessing pipeline using Pandas that improved downstream model accuracy through cleaner inputs.

AI Engineer.title: Image Classifier with Deep Learning
AI Engineer.expectedOutput: A trained CNN model that classifies images into categories with reported accuracy metrics.
AI Engineer.resumeBullet: Trained a CNN image classifier using PyTorch, achieving strong accuracy on a held-out test set.

AI Engineer.title: Deployed LLM-Powered Chat Assistant
AI Engineer.expectedOutput: A deployed web app where users chat with an LLM-backed assistant via an API endpoint.
AI Engineer.resumeBullet: Deployed an LLM-powered chat assistant as a production API, integrating prompt engineering and response handling.

ML Engineer.title: House Price Prediction Model
ML Engineer.expectedOutput: A regression model that predicts prices with evaluated error metrics (RMSE/MAE).
ML Engineer.resumeBullet: Built a regression model in scikit-learn to predict housing prices, validated with RMSE and cross-validation.

ML Engineer.title: Automated Model Training Pipeline
ML Engineer.expectedOutput: A containerized, repeatable pipeline that trains and validates a model on new data automatically.
ML Engineer.resumeBullet: Engineered a Dockerized ML training pipeline with automated cross-validation, streamlining model iteration.

ML Engineer.title: Monitored Production ML Service
ML Engineer.expectedOutput: A deployed model endpoint with logging/monitoring to detect data drift and performance decay.
ML Engineer.resumeBullet: Deployed and monitored a production ML service, implementing drift detection to maintain model reliability.

DevOps Engineer.title: Dockerized CI Pipeline
DevOps Engineer.expectedOutput: A containerized app with an automated CI pipeline that builds and tests on every commit.
DevOps Engineer.resumeBullet: Set up a Dockerized CI pipeline that automated build and test execution on every code push.

DevOps Engineer.title: Infrastructure Monitoring Dashboard
DevOps Engineer.expectedOutput: A live dashboard tracking uptime, CPU, and memory metrics for deployed services.
DevOps Engineer.resumeBullet: Built an infrastructure monitoring dashboard to track service health and reduce mean time to detection.

DevOps Engineer.title: Full CI/CD with Automated Rollbacks
DevOps Engineer.expectedOutput: A pipeline that deploys to production and automatically rolls back on failed health checks.
DevOps Engineer.resumeBullet: Implemented a CI/CD pipeline with automated rollback on failure, improving deployment reliability.

Data Analyst.title: Sales Data Cleaning & Exploration
Data Analyst.expectedOutput: A cleaned sales dataset with summary statistics and key trends documented.
Data Analyst.resumeBullet: Cleaned and analyzed a multi-thousand-row sales dataset, surfacing key revenue trends via SQL.

Data Analyst.title: Interactive Sales Dashboard
Data Analyst.expectedOutput: An interactive dashboard with filters showing sales performance by region and time.
Data Analyst.resumeBullet: Built an interactive Power BI dashboard enabling stakeholders to self-serve regional sales insights.

Data Analyst.title: Customer Churn Analysis Report
Data Analyst.expectedOutput: A data-driven report identifying churn drivers with actionable recommendations.
Data Analyst.resumeBullet: Delivered a churn analysis report identifying key drivers, informing a retention strategy for stakeholders.

Cyber Security.title: Home Network Vulnerability Scanner
Cyber Security.expectedOutput: A documented scan report identifying open ports, running services, and basic vulnerabilities on a home network.
Cyber Security.resumeBullet: Performed a network vulnerability scan using Nmap, identifying and documenting 10+ exposed services and misconfigurations.

Cyber Security.title: Web Application Penetration Test (Lab Environment)
Cyber Security.expectedOutput: A penetration test report covering identified vulnerabilities, exploitation steps, and remediation recommendations on a deliberately vulnerable web app.
Cyber Security.resumeBullet: Conducted a penetration test on a vulnerable web application, identifying OWASP Top 10 flaws and proposing remediation steps.

Cyber Security.title: SIEM-Based Threat Detection & Incident Response Simulation
Cyber Security.expectedOutput: A working SIEM setup that detects simulated attacks with an accompanying incident response playbook.
Cyber Security.resumeBullet: Built a SIEM-based detection pipeline in Splunk, reducing simulated incident triage time through automated alerting and a documented response playbook.

Software Engineer.title: Command-Line Task Manager
Software Engineer.expectedOutput: A working CLI application that creates, updates, and persists a user's tasks to local storage.
Software Engineer.resumeBullet: Built a command-line task manager with persistent storage, applying core data structures to manage CRUD operations.

Software Engineer.title: URL Shortener Service with Unit Tests
Software Engineer.expectedOutput: A deployed URL-shortening service with a test suite covering core business logic and edge cases.
Software Engineer.resumeBullet: Developed a URL shortener service with 90%+ test coverage, applying OOP principles and REST API design.

Software Engineer.title: Distributed Job Scheduler
Software Engineer.expectedOutput: A fault-tolerant scheduler that distributes and executes background jobs across multiple worker processes.
Software Engineer.resumeBullet: Designed and implemented a distributed job scheduler handling concurrent job execution and failure recovery across worker nodes.

UI/UX Designer.title: Mobile App Wireframes
UI/UX Designer.expectedOutput: A set of low-fidelity wireframes for a mobile app based on a defined user flow.
UI/UX Designer.resumeBullet: Created low-fidelity wireframes for a mobile app, grounded in user research and defined task flows.

UI/UX Designer.expectedOutput: An interactive prototype validated through moderated usability testing sessions.
UI/UX Designer.resumeBullet: Designed a clickable prototype and ran usability tests, iterating on design based on user feedback.

UI/UX Designer.title: End-to-End Design System
UI/UX Designer.expectedOutput: A documented design system with reusable components handed off to engineering.
UI/UX Designer.resumeBullet: Built an accessible, reusable design system, streamlining design-to-development handoff across teams.

Mobile App Developer.title: Simple Notes Mobile App
Mobile App Developer.expectedOutput: A mobile app that lets users create and store notes locally on the device.
Mobile App Developer.resumeBullet: Built a mobile notes app with local persistence, applying core mobile UI patterns.

Mobile App Developer.title: Weather App with API & Location

Mobile App Developer.title: Cross-Platform App with Push Notifications
Mobile App Developer.expectedOutput: A published-ready cross-platform app supporting push notifications and optimized performance.
Mobile App Developer.resumeBullet: Shipped a cross-platform mobile app with push notification support, optimizing startup time and memory usage.

Web Developer.expectedOutput: A responsive multi-section personal website that adapts cleanly to mobile, tablet, and desktop screens.
Web Developer.resumeBullet: Built a responsive personal portfolio website using semantic HTML and CSS, ensuring cross-device compatibility.
